title: Fall backwards into the void with a smile — multi-mode self-portrait manifesto (2026)
html:
Fall backwards into the void with a smile — multi-mode self-portrait manifesto (2026)

Source: 2026-02-26 Apple Note. Four-paragraph self-portrait painting Yahir across his contrasting modes. Densest single-note manifesto of 2026.

TL;DR

  • The title line: "I want to be the motherfucker that falls backwards into the void with a smile on his face and a peace sign thrown up, and maneuvers that motherfucker like it's the time of his life." — peak walk with gods eyes tonality.
  • Battle-mode: "I want to be the motherfucker that leads his crew in battle, head first... arm chopped off, eyes speared, soul on the verge of collapse, but it does not matter because there's zero wavering. It's just pure soul fire, God."
  • Family-mode contrast: "When I'm with my family, my children, my wife, I'm a butterfly. I'm tender. I'm a goofy little playmate. And with my friends I'm silly, intense, fun, joyful, spinning, twirling."
  • Sovereignty thesis: "I want to live my life on my own terms, weird terms, own a cord, hacky and genius. Not giving a flying fuck what people tell you to do because you decide the outcome of things. You bend reality to your will."
  • Genre summit: this is the most fully-realized version of the manifesto style note genre — multi-modal (battlefield + family + sovereign), not just one register.
  • Sits 1 month after 2026 01 22 "I am a killer" — same Q1-2026 manifesto cluster, but here Yahir layers tenderness over the killer.

Connections

  • soul as beacon
  • 2026 01 22 i am a fucking killer
  • 2026 04 14 i am gods eyes
